author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Forever Ago - Release Date Trailer | PS5 Games
Wishlist today: https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10018129/

Forever Ago is coming October 8, 2026 to PlayStation 5.

Following a tragic stroke of fate, Alfred embarks on a journey north in search of redemption. In this single-player road trip adventure, you'll travel to beautiful places, capture memories with your camera, meet interesting characters, and even make some new friends.

Discover Stories 
Experience a nuanced and heartfelt story about broken dreams, loss, and regret—but also courage, hope, and true friendship. Learn about the stories, beliefs and struggles of characters you meet along the way, brought to life by renowned voice actors.

Embark on an Unforgettable Road Trip
Explore beautiful environments, ranging from serene forest trails to dusty barrens sweltering in the desert sun. Examine and interact with objects to learn about your surroundings and the people living there. And don’t forget to pet the dog.

Capture Memories
Take pictures with Alfred’s good ol' instant camera to document your journey and solve small environmental puzzles. 

Relive True Love
Play through a lifetime of love as Alfred with your sweetheart Audrey, experiencing a true love that transcends time. Featuring an original soundtrack by Clark Aboud (Slay the Spire, Kind Words).

© 2026 Developed by Third Shift. Published by Annapurna Interactive. All rights reserved.

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Control Resonant - Take Control Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/control-resonant/

Video Title (Consumer Facing):
Control Resonant - Take CONTROL Trailer | PS5 Games

Video Description (Consumer Facing):
Wield the Aberrant. Stop the Hiss. Rediscover your humanity. Take control.

After years of imprisonment at the hands of the Federal Bureau of Control, Dylan Faden is free on the streets of Manhattan. But the city is overrun by otherworldly forces and at the peak of a paranatural crisis, and Dylan needs to contain and comprehend the dangers he is now facing. His sister, Bureau Director Jesse Faden, is missing. He has to find her and reckon with the world around him.

CONTROL Resonant arrives September 24th 2026 to PlayStation 5. Pre-order now!

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Terrinoth: Heroes of Descent - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10017368/

The legendary board game series is available now on PS5!

Dark forces are drawn to the lands of Terrinoth. Yet somewhere lies a forgotten relic that could turn the tides. Such power cannot fall into the wrong hands, lest the fate of the world plunge into unending darkness.

Form your company of ragtag adventurers, journey into the perilous dungeons of Terrinoth, face the mysterious upheaval of an occult master and unfold a fully original storyline set one year before the events of Descent: Legends of the Dark.

⚔️ Master your Heroes: Choose from 8 signature adventurers each with their own background and combat style. Hone your skills and perks through leveling; upgrade your equipment at the Forge; and become an undefeated company of heroes.

⚔️ Authentic dungeon crawler: Explore 20 massive dungeons with unique environments and full-voiced storylines. Meet characters with dynamic dialogues that adapt to your party and complete side quests with narrative highlights.

⚔️ Accessible Turn-Based Combat: Tactical combat without steep learning curves or complex rule books! Use positioning, elevation, line of sight and timing to your advantage against cunning foes and ruthless bosses. Unleash multi-character combos and finish ‘em with devastating Synergy attacks. 

⚔️ Full Campaign, One-Night Missions: Unfold an epic story-driven campaign spanning through four themed Chapters split in multiple self-contained Missions. Each can be completed in a one-night session and offer a unique, replayable experience. Perfect for game night!

⚔️ Play Solo or Co-Op up to 4 players Online: Face the forces of darkness alone, or team up with your friends online, with full controller support included. They can even join mid-dungeon.

#ps5 #ps5games

text:
Remothered: Red Nun's Legacy - Gameplay Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10018448

Here’s your first look at the gameplay of Remothered: Red Nun’s Legacy, the latest chapter in the iconic survival horror saga.

Play as Susan, driven by a mother's desperate love.

Face murderous stalkers, hide, evade, and fight back only when necessary. 

But survival isn’t just about escaping; master hypnosis powers to uncover forgotten memories, reveal hidden paths and reshape the environment itself.

Remothered: Red Nun’s Legacy launches later this year.

Wishlist now. Escape later.

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Rivage - Release Date Reveal Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10017506/

Rivage is coming to PlayStation 5 on August 13th, 2026.  

Rivage is a first-person sci-fi puzzle adventure set aboard the A.R.E.S. space station, trapped in a mysterious space phenomenon. 

You play as Miranda, a researcher stuck in an infinite time loop. Your crew has vanished, only their journals, recordings, and personal belongings remain. Explore the station to solve puzzles and piece together what happened. 

Expect intricate logic puzzles, locked doors that won't open on the first try, and strange phenomenon onboard. 

Developed by Exnilo Studio 

Published by Raw Fury
